habitat: Fynbos of South Africa's Cape region.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Cape herbal tea, caffeine-free, honey-like aroma; folk use for mild coughs.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller koffeinfreier Kap-Tee mit Honigaroma; volksmedizinisch bei leichtem Husten.
cautions: Generally safe as beverage in normal amounts.
historicalNotes: Sister industry to rooibos in South African fynbos agriculture.
cautionsDe: Im Allgemeinen unbedenklich as beverage in normal amounts.
historicalNotesDe: Sister industry zu rooibos in Südafrikan fynbos agriculture.
